name: github.com.argoproj.argo_events.pkg.apis.events.v1alpha1.FileEventSource
description: FileEventSource describes an event-source for file related events.

eventType.name:
Type of file operations to watch
Refer https://github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify/blob/master/fsnotify.go for more information

metadata.name:
Metadata holds the user defined metadata which will passed along the event payload.
+optional

watchPathConfig.name: WatchPathConfig contains configuration about the file path to watch
